summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of The Blues Hotel Collective website. All backend APIs (20/20) and frontend features tested successfully. Both public and admin functionality verified working.
passed_tests: Backend API authentication with admin credentials (admin@theblueshotel.com.au / password)
All backend endpoints: shows (3), episodes (3), events (2), newsletter, contact, community submissions
Admin dashboard with correct stats display (3 episodes, 2 events, 1 subscriber, 3 unread messages)
Homepage loads with hero section, latest episodes (3 cards), events teaser (2 cards), newsletter signup
Podcast player functionality: play buttons trigger persistent bottom player bar, expand/collapse works
Where to Listen page loads at /podcasts/where-to-listen
Admin login and dashboard access with navigation to episodes, events, settings pages
Newsletter subscription form works with success toast notification
Contact form submission works with proper validation and success toast
Backend seeded data correct: 3 shows, 3 episodes, 2 events as expected

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all pages, navigation, forms, podcast player working)
